validates_acceptance_checklist_before_ac.description: Agent MUST validate all 14 acceptance checklist items before accepting any test authoring task — stopping if any item fails
validates_acceptance_checklist_before_ac.observable_check: execution_log contains acceptance_checklist_items_verified AND all_items_pass OR clarification_requested

validates_write_boundary_and_scope.description: Agent MUST confirm write boundary is explicitly declared and all files to be modified are within scope before authoring tests
validates_write_boundary_and_scope.observable_check: execution_log contains write_boundary_confirmed AND boundary_is_explicit AND files_verified_in_scope

validates_research_quality_gates.description: Agent MUST validate research quality gates (source tier, mechanism completeness, failure mode coverage, source conflict, falsification check) when tests depend on research findings
validates_research_quality_gates.observable_check: execution_log contains research_quality_gates_checked AND gate_results_documented AND issue_surfaced_if_failed

runs_acceptance_checklist_and_stops_on_f.description: Agent MUST run full acceptance checklist for every dispatch and return rejection if any item fails
runs_acceptance_checklist_and_stops_on_f.observable_check: execution_log contains checklist_executed AND (all_pass OR rejection_returned)

enumerates_failure_modes_and_justifies_o.description: Agent MUST enumerate ways the claim could be false and provide explicit oracle honesty justification per test before authoring
enumerates_failure_modes_and_justifies_o.observable_check: execution_log contains failure_modes_enumerated AND failure_mode_count > 0 AND oracle_honesty_justification_per_test AND all_tests_have_justification

traces_real_coverage_and_runs_all_tests.description: Agent MUST trace actual claim paths exercised per test (not coverage metrics) and execute every authored test capturing pass/fail
traces_real_coverage_and_runs_all_tests.observable_check: execution_log contains coverage_trace_per_test AND path_exercised_is_claim_path AND test_executed AND results_captured AND test_count == authored_count

does_not_author_without_claim_or_falsifi.description: Agent MUST NOT author tests without a singular, falsifiable claim under test and an explicit falsification criterion
does_not_author_without_claim_or_falsifi.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains test_authored AND (claim_absent OR falsification_criterion_absent))

does_not_author_tautological_assertions_.description: Agent MUST NOT author tautological assertions or mock integration boundaries the claim depends on
does_not_author_tautological_assertions_.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains tautological_assertion OR (mock_at_claim_seam AND claim depends on seam))

does_not_expand_coverage_or_skip_red_pha.description: Agent MUST NOT expand coverage beyond dispatched vertical slice or skip verification that red tests fail for the right reason
does_not_expand_coverage_or_skip_red_pha.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains coverage beyond dispatched claim OR (red_phase_test AND failure_reason_not_verified))
